summary: Script follows bash conventions well (#!/usr/bin/env bash, set -euo pipefail, quoted vars, proper error handling). Workflow uses GitHub Actions best practices (v4 pinned actions, least-privilege permissions, GITHUB_OUTPUT). Critical issues: (1) Workflow defaults to fixtures/commits-feat.txt but provides no mechanism to create it—workflow fails on bare `act push` without pre-existing fixtures; no sensible fallback (requirement: "avoid steps requiring external input without sensible defaults"). (2) Regex patterns duplicated across determine_bump_type and generate_changelog (lines ~70–110): ^feat(\([^)]+\))?!?: and ^fix patterns appear 4+ times—should extract to constants or helper. (3) JSON parsing via grep+sed is fragile; empty/malformed JSON breaks silently. Fixture files referenced in requirements are missing from deliverable. If fixtures were included and regex duplication factored out, quality would be 4/5.
